case_title: IVONNE REYNOSO ET AL VS. LUIS SUAZO ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JAN-07-2015 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LUIS SUAZO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE.
